---
name: Developer Mode Suggestion
about: Suggest enhancements for developer mode, shortcuts, integrations, or configs.
title: "[DEV-MODE] "
labels: developer-mode
assignees: ''

---

**Describe the suggestion**
A clear and concise description of the developer-focused feature, shortcut configuration, or command-line utility expansion you are proposing.

**What specific workflow does this improve?**
Explain how this helps software developers, power users, or system administrators (e.g. Vim/Emacs bindings, JSON config extensions, integration with terminal emulators like Alacritty/Windows Terminal).

**Proposed configuration/syntax format (if applicable)**
Provide an example configuration layout, keyboard shortcut structure, or pseudocode/command line syntax:
```json
// Example proposed shortcut config or expansion rule
{
  "trigger": "gitc",
  "expansion": "git commit -m \"{cursor}\"",
  "mode": "developer"
}
```

**Additional Context**
Add any other context, existing open-source utility examples, or reference tools here.
